---
comments: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)

make_table <- function(path) {
  df <- read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  df <- df |>
    mutate(
      `Course Name` = ifelse(
        is.na(link) | link == "",
        course_name,
        paste0('<a href="', link, '">', course_name, "</a>")
      ),
      Terms = paste0("<em>", terms, "</em>")
    ) |>
    transmute(
      `Course Number` = course_number,
      `Course Name`,
      Terms
    )

  knitr::kable(
    df,
    format = "html",
    align = "l",
    escape = FALSE,
    table.attr = 'class="courses-table"'
  )
}
```


### University of California, Los Angeles

```{r}
#| echo: false
make_table("data/courses-ucla.csv")
```

## California State University, Fullerton

```{r}
#| echo: false
make_table("data/courses-csuf.csv")
```
